title: XV7 architecture summary
summary: XV7 uses a core API, frontend, Open WebUI, and Ollama in a local Docker stack.
body: Architecture summary from repo structure: core FastAPI service handles sessions, runtime model routing, and auth-protected mutation routes; frontend provides local UI and API bridge; Open WebUI provides browser chat UI; Ollama provides local model inference. Runtime includes model profile/effective model endpoints and safe model-use receipts. Service reachability and overall system stability must be treated as unverified until a fresh readiness check or live proof is available in the current session.

facts.statement: XV7 core API exposes health, runtime model endpoints, and session routes.
Open WebUI and frontend are separate services in the Docker stack.
Repo structure can be described from source, but runtime service health and system stability require fresh proof in the current session.

evidence: Repo structure and compose services are visible in source; runtime status requires fresh proof.
